added_sources.title: Micron Technology Reports Results for the Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026
added_sources.evidence_summary: Micron reported record Q2 fiscal 2026 results, strong demand, tight industry supply, and Q3 guidance of $33.5B revenue with approximately 81% gross margin.
limitations: Primary source for Micron only; still an indirect proxy for NVIDIA.

added_sources.title: Micron Q2 FY2026 8-K Exhibit 99.1
added_sources.evidence_summary: SEC-filed Micron release states Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue of $23.86B and quotes management describing memory as a strategic asset in the AI era.
limitations: Does not directly quantify NVIDIA revenue impact.

added_sources.title: Vertiv Reports Strong First Quarter with Diluted EPS Growth of 136% (Adjusted Diluted EPS Growth of +83%); Raises Full-Year Guidance
added_sources.evidence_summary: Vertiv reported Q1 2026 adjusted diluted EPS growth of 83%, strong free cash flow, raised guidance, and described robust data-center market momentum supported by demand fundamentals.
limitations: Primary source for Vertiv only; still indirect for NVIDIA.

added_sources.title: Vertiv Q1 2026 8-K Exhibit 99.1
added_sources.evidence_summary: SEC-filed Vertiv release reports Q1 2026 results and raised guidance, strengthening the data-center infrastructure proxy evidence.
limitations: Does not directly quantify NVIDIA exposure.

added_sources.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
added_sources.evidence_summary: The official FOMC statement maintained the target range at 3.50%-3.75%, described economic activity as expanding at a solid pace, stated inflation is elevated partly due to global energy prices, and noted Middle East uncertainty.

added_sources.title: Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
added_sources.evidence_summary: The implementation note directs open market operations to maintain the federal funds rate in the 3.50%-3.75% target range.

added_sources.title: US opens bidding for 92.5 million-barrel SPR crude loan
added_sources.evidence_summary: S&P Global reported DOE Office of Petroleum Reserves bidding for an emergency SPR crude loan connected to supply disruptions caused by the war with Iran.
limitations: Secondary source; DOE primary release should be added if available.

added_sources.title: NVIDIA Statistics & Valuation
added_sources.evidence_summary: StockAnalysis listed NVIDIA trailing P/E near 41.33, forward P/E near 24.28, and PEG ratio near 0.64. This supports PEG context but conflicts with the exact forward P/E cited by TradingAgents.
limitations: Does not support TradingAgents' exact forward P/E value.

added_sources.title: NVIDIA Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
added_sources.evidence_summary: StockAnalysis listed forecast EPS estimates including FY2027 and FY2028 estimates, providing a secondary estimates trail for forward valuation calculations.
limitations: Requires explicit calculation to validate any stated forward multiple.

missing_evidence: direct support for TradingAgents' 17.7x forward P/E figure
retrieval_actions: Retrieved secondary valuation data from StockAnalysis.com.
Retrieved secondary EPS estimate context from StockAnalysis.com forecast page.
Compared retrieved forward P/E context against TradingAgents' stated value.
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Additional valuation sources support a PEG context near the TradingAgents figure but indicate forward P/E around the mid-20s, not the stated 17.7x. The exact TradingAgents forward P/E claim should not be upgraded without a verified calculation or paid estimates source.
residual_gaps: Add paid or licensed estimates provider if exact institutional forward multiples are required.
Compute forward P/E from explicitly sourced price and EPS estimate for the report timestamp.

retrieval_actions: Retrieved Micron primary investor-relations Q2 FY2026 results.
Retrieved Vertiv primary investor-relations Q1 2026 results.
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: The proxy evidence is strengthened by primary and SEC-filed Micron and Vertiv sources. It supports the AI memory and data-center infrastructure backdrop. It remains proxy evidence, not direct NVIDIA revenue proof.
residual_gaps: Graph the proxy relationship explicitly as indirect evidence.
Do not use proxy evidence as direct NVIDIA revenue validation.

retrieval_actions: Retrieved official Federal Reserve implementation note.
Retrieved S&P Global energy-market report on SPR crude loan.
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Official FOMC evidence supports Fed hold, elevated inflation, energy-price and Middle East uncertainty context. Energy-market reporting supports SPR/oil disruption context. The broad macro/geopolitical backdrop is sufficiently supported for Stage 2B.
residual_gaps: For final reports, cite official DOE release if available.
Separate macro backdrop from issuer-specific catalyst in Titan horizon classification.
